summary: Complete Apple-inspired UI redesign verification - ALL 16+ pages tested successfully with no JS errors. Brand colors verified across all components.

issues: One React key warning in console (non-critical): 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - this is a minor React best practice issue, not a visual bug

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React key prop warning exists - consider adding unique keys to list items for better React performance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apple-inspired UI redesign is COMPLETE and verified. All hardcoded colors replaced with brand tokens. Brand color system fully operational.
